untranslatable_reason: This signal is a portfolio-level leverage constraint rule, not a price-based trading signal. It requires: (1) tracking portfolio total unrestricted leverage (sum of absolute values across multiple strategies), (2) comparing against account type-dependent thresholds (2 overnight / 4 intraday), and (3) proportionally scaling all strategy positions by a common factor. None of these portfolio-level constructs, multi-strategy aggregations, or position-sizing operations are expressible using the single-instrument indicator set provided. This rule belongs in a position-sizing module or risk management layer, not in a technical signal-based backtest engine.
translation_notes: Signal CHAN_QT_DRY_0 is a risk control/compliance rule for multi-strategy portfolio management. It requires access to: total portfolio leverage across all strategies, account type context (retail/overnight vs intraday), and the ability to apply uniform position scaling across multiple independent strategies. The backtest engine as specified operates on single-instrument price/technical indicators and cannot model cross-strategy portfolio aggregation or dynamically enforce account leverage limits.
